data.name: LustVrStudio
data.detailed_description:
Choose from a wide variety of characters
You can choose different couples to choose the one that best suits your taste, there are a variety of ethnicities to choose from.


Enjoy the action the way you like it.
You can choose whether you want to interact and watch the action in first person or spectator mode.
data.about_the_game:
Choose from a wide variety of characters
You can choose different couples to choose the one that best suits your taste, there are a variety of ethnicities to choose from.


Enjoy the action the way you like it.
You can choose whether you want to interact and watch the action in first person or spectator mode.
data.short_description: LustVrStudio is a virtual reality game that allows you to choose between several characters, as well as enjoy the action both in first person and in a third person mode, plus you will be allowed to switch between positions to choose the one you like best.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-bit version 1909 revision .1350 or higher, or versions 2004 and 20H2 revision .789 or higher.
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350
  • 記憶體: 12000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Requires an NVIDIA GeForce GTX-1070 or higher card.
  • VR 支援: Oculus PC
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
